texto: Our culture is obsessed with youth because we have lost the ancient knowledge that growth never stops. We are not transient, momentary mistakes inthe cosmos- evolutionary curiosities that rise like mayflies, swarm for a day, and are gone. We are players who are here to stay, and the universe was built with us in mind. We reflect it, with our deepest loves and loftiest aspirations, just as it reflects us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eben Alexander M.D.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Our culture is obsessed with youth because we have lost the ancient knowledge that growth never s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, inspiracional, inspirational-living pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e inspiracao.
